## Tasks.TaskRefStatus type

Validation status for a step's task reference. Used at load time to mark incomplete references without hard failing.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type TaskRefStatus = 'valid' | 'task-not-found' | 'missing-variables' | 'invalid-params';
```
